arguments.file_text:
# CPM Conversion Report — Enterprise.slnx

## 1. Conversion Overview

- **Scope**: `Enterprise.slnx` (solution-level conversion)
- **Projects converted**: 5 (Api, Core, Legacy, Tests, Web)
- **Packages centralized**: 8 unique packages into `Directory.Packages.props`
- **MSBuild properties inlined and removed**: `$(BlobsVersion)` (12.24.0) and `$(HostingVersion)` (8.0.1) from `Directory.Build.props`
- **Shared import updated**: `Common.props` — `Microsoft.Extensions.Logging` version attribute removed (now centrally managed)
- **Conditional package references preserved**: `Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson` in `Api.csproj` retains per-TFM conditions via conditional `<PackageVersion>` entries

## 2. Version Conflict Resolutions

Two version conflicts were resolved by aligning to the highest version, as requested:

### System.Text.Json

| Version | Projects |
|---------|----------|
| 10.0.1 | Web, Api, Tests |
| 9.0.0 | Core |
| 8.0.5 | Legacy |

**Resolution**: Aligned to **10.0.1** (highest). Core now resolves 10.0.1 (was 9.0.0). Legacy now resolves 10.0.1 (was 8.0.5). This is a major version bump for both projects.

### Azure.Storage.Blobs

| Version | Projects |
|---------|----------|
| 12.24.0 | Api (via `$(BlobsVersion)`) |
| 12.19.0 | Legacy |

**Resolution**: Aligned to **12.24.0** (highest). Legacy now resolves 12.24.0 (was 12.19.0). This is a minor version bump within the same major version.

## 3. Package Comparison — Baseline vs. Result

### Changes

| Project | TFM | Package | Before | After | Status |
|---------|-----|---------|--------|-------|--------|
| Core.csproj | net8.0 | System.Text.Json | 9.0.0 | 10.0.1 | Aligned to highest version |
| Legacy.csproj | net6.0 | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.19.0 | 12.24.0 | Aligned to highest version |
| Legacy.csproj | net6.0 | System.Text.Json | 8.0.5 | 10.0.1 | Aligned to highest version |

### Unchanged (17 packages)

| Project | TFM | Package | Version |
|---------|-----|---------|---------|
| Api.csproj | net6.0 | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.24.0 |
| Api.csproj | net6.0 | Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson | 6.0.36 |
| Api.csproj | net6.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Api.csproj | net6.0 | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
| Api.csproj | net8.0 | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.24.0 |
| Api.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson | 8.0.11 |
| Api.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Api.csproj | net8.0 | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
| Core.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | 8.0.1 |
| Core.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Legacy.csproj | net6.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Tests.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Tests.csproj | net8.0 | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |
| Tests.csproj | net8.0 | xunit | 2.9.3 |
| Web.csproj | net8.0 | Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 |
| Web.csproj | net8.0 | OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | 1.15.0 |
| Web.csproj | net8.0 | System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 |

## 4. Risk Assessment

**[Moderate risk]** — Three packages changed resolved versions due to alignment to the highest version. The build and restore succeeded.

- **System.Text.Json 8.0.5 → 10.0.1 in Legacy.csproj**: This is a major version bump (8.x → 10.x). Review for breaking API changes in the Legacy project.
- **System.Text.Json 9.0.0 → 10.0.1 in Core.csproj**: Major version bump (9.x → 10.x). Lower risk since it's a single major version increment.
- **Azure.Storage.Blobs 12.19.0 → 12.24.0 in Legacy.csproj**: Minor version bump within 12.x. Generally safe but review release notes for behavioral changes.

Recommend running `dotnet test` to verify no regressions, especially in Core and Legacy projects.

## 5. Follow-up Items

1. **Run `dotnet test`** — Validate runtime behavior beyond build success, particularly for Core and Legacy projects which received version bumps.
2. **Review System.Text.Json release notes** — Core moved from 9.0.0 to 10.0.1 and Legacy moved from 8.0.5 to 10.0.1. Check for breaking changes in the [System.Text.Json release notes](https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/releases).
3. **Review Azure.Storage.Blobs release notes** — Legacy moved from 12.19.0 to 12.24.0. Check the [Azure SDK release notes](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/storage/Azure.Storage.Blobs/CHANGELOG.md) for behavioral changes.
4. **net6.0 end-of-support** — Api.csproj (multi-targets net6.0/net8.0) and Legacy.csproj (targets net6.0) use an out-of-support framework. Consider migrating to a supported TFM.

## 6. Artifacts and How to Use Them

- **`baseline.binlog`** — MSBuild binary log captured before CPM conversion. Use with [MSBuild Structured Log Viewer](https://msbuildlog.com/) for investigation.
- **`after-cpm.binlog`** — MSBuild binary log captured after CPM conversion. Compare with baseline for troubleshooting.
- **`baseline-packages.json`** — Resolved package versions per project before conversion.
- **`after-cpm-packages.json`** — Resolved package versions per project after conversion.
- **`convert-to-cpm.md`** — This report file, suitable for use as a pull request description or team review artifact.

Recommend running `dotnet test` to validate runtime behavior. For the packages that changed versions, review their respective release notes before merging.

1. **Run `dotnet test`** — Validate runtime behavior beyond build success, particularly for Core and Legacy projects which received version bumps.

4. **net6.0 end-of-support** — Api.csproj (multi-targets net6.0/net8.0) and Legacy.csproj (targets net6.0) use an out-of-support framework. Consider migrating to a supported TFM.

## 6. Artifacts and How to Use Them

- **`baseline.binlog`** — MSBuild binary log captured before CPM conversion. Use with [MSBuild Structured Log Viewer](https://msbuildlog.com/) for investigation.
- **`after-cpm.binlog`** — MSBuild binary log captured after CPM conversion. Compare with baseline for troubleshooting.
- **`baseline-packages.json`** — Resolved package versions per project before conversion.
- **`after-cpm-packages.json`** — Resolved package versions per project after conversion.
- **`convert-to-cpm.md`** — This report file, suitable for use as a pull request description or team review artifact.

Recommend running `dotnet test` to validate runtime behavior. For the packages that changed versions, review their respective release notes before merging.

data.content:
No leftover `Version=` attributes on any `PackageReference` — only NuGet-generated `obj/` files (which are expected). The `$(BlobsVersion)` and `$(HostingVersion)` properties have been removed from `Directory.Build.props`.

**Conversion complete.** Here's what was done:

**Files created:**
- `Directory.Packages.props` — 8 centralized package versions, with conditional entries for `Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson` per TFM

**Files modified:**
- `Directory.Build.props` — removed `$(BlobsVersion)` and `$(HostingVersion)` properties (inlined)
- `Common.props` — removed `Version` from shared `Microsoft.Extensions.Logging` reference
- 5 `.csproj` files — removed all `Version` attributes from `PackageReference` items

**Version changes (aligned to highest):**
| Project | Package | Before → After |
|---------|---------|----------------|
| Core | System.Text.Json | 9.0.0 → 10.0.1 |
| Legacy | System.Text.Json | 8.0.5 → 10.0.1 |
| Legacy | Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.19.0 → 12.24.0 |

**Risk: Moderate** — run `dotnet test` to verify Core and Legacy. Full details in `convert-to-cpm.md`.
